exercises.ex_1_d: Straighten one leg at a time while sitting to engage the quadriceps.
exercises.ex_2_d: Pull one knee toward your chest while sitting to activate the abdominal muscles.
exercises.ex_3_d: Lift both knees together toward your chest while holding the chair for stability.
exercises.ex_4_d: Rotate your torso slowly from side to side while seated to stretch the back.
exercises.ex_5_d: Contract and hold your gluteal muscles while sitting to activate the posterior chain.
exercises.ex_6_d: Extend legs and move them up and down in a small, rapid motion while seated.
exercises.ex_7_d: Cross one ankle over the opposite knee and lean forward to stretch the hips.
exercises.ex_8_d: Lift your heels off the ground while sitting to activate the calf muscles.
exercises.ex_9_d: Lift your shoulders toward your ears and release to relieve tension in the traps.
exercises.ex_10_d: Arch and round your back while seated to improve spinal mobility.
exercises.ex_11_d: Mimic a curling motion with your arms to engage the biceps while sitting.
exercises.ex_12_d: Lift your body off the chair using your arms and core for an isometric hold.
exercises.ex_13_d: Perform a push-up leaning against the edge of a sturdy desk.
exercises.ex_14_d: Hold a plank position with your forearms resting on the desk surface.
exercises.ex_15_d: Use the edge of the desk to lower and raise your body using your triceps.
exercises.ex_16_d: Place hands on the desk and step back, dropping your head between arms to stretch the chest.
exercises.ex_17_d: Pull fingers back against the desk or press palms together to stretch the wrists.
exercises.ex_18_d: Rotate your wrists in circular motions while resting your forearms on the desk.
exercises.ex_19_d: Bring knees toward the desk in a running motion while leaning on the desk.
exercises.ex_20_d: Lean on the desk and rotate your hips from side to side to engage the side abs.
exercises.ex_21_d: Stand behind your desk and lift your heels while using the desk for balance.
exercises.ex_22_d: Lean forward from the hips with hands on the desk to stretch the hamstrings.
exercises.ex_23_d: Spread fingers wide and press them against the desk surface to relieve hand tension.
exercises.ex_24_d: Press your palms against the desk with maximum force for a chest hold.
exercises.ex_25_d: Lean your back against a wall and lower into a squat position, holding it isometrically.
exercises.ex_26_d: Stand facing a wall and perform push-ups by pressing away from it.
exercises.ex_27_d: Place one arm against a wall and rotate your body away to stretch the pectoral muscles.
exercises.ex_28_d: Press your back and arms against a wall and slide your arms up and down.
exercises.ex_29_d: Place hands on a wall and step one foot back, pressing the heel down to stretch the calf.
exercises.ex_30_d: Place an elbow against the wall and lean in to stretch the back of the arm.
exercises.ex_31_d: Mimic snow angels with your back and arms flat against a wall to improve shoulder mobility.
exercises.ex_32_d: Stand with one foot against a wall and lunge forward to stretch the hip area.
exercises.ex_33_d: Stand facing a wall for balance and lift your knees high in a marching motion.
exercises.ex_34_d: Face a wall and kick one leg back while keeping it straight to activate the glutes.
exercises.ex_35_d: Lean sideways against a wall with one forearm for an isometric core hold.
exercises.ex_36_d: Place hands on a wall and walk feet back until body forms an L-shape to stretch the back.
exercises.ex_37_d: Lift knees high while standing in place to engage the core and lower body.
exercises.ex_38_d: Throw controlled punches in the air to improve arm mobility and heart rate.
exercises.ex_39_d: Perform standard jumping jacks to engage the full body and increase intensity.
exercises.ex_40_d: Slowly roll your head in a circular motion to improve neck mobility.
exercises.ex_41_d: Rotate your shoulders forward and backward to release tension and improve posture.
exercises.ex_42_d: Bend forward at the waist while standing to stretch the entire posterior chain.
exercises.ex_43_d: Pull one heel toward your glutes while standing to stretch the front of the thigh.
exercises.ex_44_d: Lift your heels off the ground while standing to strengthen the lower legs.
exercises.ex_45_d: Run in place while bringing your knees up toward your chest for a high-intensity burn.
exercises.ex_46_d: Step out to the side and bend one knee while keeping the other straight to engage glutes.
exercises.ex_47_d: Extend arms to the sides and make small or large circular motions.
exercises.ex_48_d: Bring your elbow toward the same-side knee while standing to engage the side abs.
exercises.ex_49_d: Arch and round your spine while standing with hands on knees for spinal mobility.
exercises.ex_50_d: Contract and hold your glutes while standing for an isometric activation.

app.title: CubeFit
app.no_exercises_found: No exercises found. Try adjusting your filters.
app.empty_queue: Your queue is empty. Add some exercises to get started!
app.reorder_instructions: Drag and drop to reorder your exercises before starting.
